keyPoints: Provides a dedicated Perimeter Security platform engineered to a secure access service designed to establish zero-trust connections from corporate end-user machines to cloud networks..
Integrates Secure Access Connect capabilities directly into multi-tier cloud architectures, serving as a key component of the Enterprise Networking and Security Architecture portfolio.
Encourages standard interface structures (REST APIs, Client SDKs, or console controls) to facilitate rapid cloud resource provisioning.
Establishes globally routing, logically isolated networks spanning multiple Google Cloud regions privately.
Guarantees highly available hybrid connectivity to on-premises sites using redundant VPN tunnels or private fiber paths.
Balances user traffic dynamically at Google Cloud's edge, directing requests to the lowest-latency healthy backend instance.
Protects web applications from Layer 7 exploits and OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities at Google's edge.
Filters request traffic dynamically based on IP address ranges, geographic regions, or request header expressions.
Integrates rate limiting and machine learning anomaly detection to block scraping bots and DDoS floods.
Governs access to Secure Access Connect using standard IAM roles (e.g. roles/secureaccessconnect.admin and roles/secureaccessconnect.viewer) for fine-grained permissions.
Supports audit logging to record administrative actions and verify API configuration modifications for compliance reports.
Secures operational payloads using encryption at rest (Google-managed or Customer-Managed Keys via KMS) and SSL/TLS in transit.
Offers regional and multi-regional configuration options, duplicating service state across multiple zones to sustain outage events.
Enforces API quotas and rate limits programmatically to prevent resource starvation and noisy-neighbor interference.
Provides service recovery tools, regular status logs, and high-availability SLAs matching enterprise uptime goals.
Billed based on resource metrics (e.g., operations count, active connections, or gigabytes stored) allowing cost optimization.
Integrates with Cloud Monitoring and Cloud Logging to enable real-time alerting, metrics tracking, and diagnostic dashboards.
Enables command line administration through the gcloud CLI tool, allowing pipeline automation and scripting.

scenarios.scenario: An enterprise wants to construct a secure architectural pattern involving Secure Access Connect that blocks public internet ingress and enforces strict access restrictions.
scenarios.solution: Deploy the Secure Access Connect resource inside a VPC Service Control perimeter, routing connections privately using Serverless VPC connectors or internal gateways, and assign permissions using IAM roles.

scenarios.scenario: A development team needs to build automated CI/CD configurations that configure and audit Secure Access Connect operations on a regular basis while tracking costs.
scenarios.solution: Use Cloud Build scripts executing 'gcloud' commands to provision the Secure Access Connect resources, enable Cloud Audit Logs, and configure budget notifications at the project folder level.

commands.description: Create or configure a new Secure Access Connect resource
commands.command:
gcloud secureaccessconnect create prod-secureaccessconnect-resource \
  --region=us-central1 \
  --description="Production Secure Access Connect Resource"

commands.description: List active Secure Access Connect instances and query configuration states
